title: Principles Guiding Framework Activities in Software Engineering
description: A flowchart illustrating the core principles that guide each of the five primary framework activities in the software engineering process, showing how they interconnect to ensure project quality and management.
relationships: Principles from 'Planning' inform the approach to 'Modeling'
The models created dictate the 'Construction' principles
Principles applied during 'Construction' ensure a successful 'Deployment'
